CustomField.description: This field stores the queue end time i.e. the time in which cases should be assigned to the corresponding queue if a customer comments or sends email related to the case and the owner is on time-off
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field stores the queue end time i.e. the time in which cases should be assigned to the corresponding queue if a customer comments or sends email related to the case and the owner is on time-off
CustomField.label: Queue End Time
